name: Sourdough Trail Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sourdough starter, water, and flour for 24 to 48 hours before making the pancakes. Cover with saran-wrap and allow to stand at room temperature (or in oven out of drafts).
2. In the morning, remove and save 1 cup of the starter for future use.
3. To the remaining sourdough starter, add the raw egg, oil, and dry milk powder. Blend together the salt, baking soda, and sugar and sprinkle over the top of the batter.
4. Gently fold in the ingredients. Allow the batter to rest 30 to 45 minutes. If necessary, thin the batter with milk to achieve a consistency similar to cream.
5. Cook silver dollar-sized pancakes (using a serving spoon to measure) on a hot greased/oiled griddle.
6. The number of servings is the number of silver dollar-sized pancakes from the recipe.
